items.title: Lampard's Coventry return to Prem after 25 years
items.summary: Coventry City will return to the Premier League for the first time in 25 years after securing their promotion from the Championship with a draw at Blackburn.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 2026 RBC Heritage leaderboard: Matt Fitzpatrick takes control with Friday 63, Viktor Hovland hot in pursuit
items.summary: Fitzpatrick took advantage of calm early conditions in Round 2 to seize control of the RBC Heritage
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Lancashire to put matches behind paywall; Rew sparkles for Somerset on rain-hit day – as it happened
items.summary: James Rew’s unbeaten 77 helped put Somerset in a strong position after bowling out Hampshire for 238, while Jamie Porter made inroads for Essex at Egbaston before the weather in...
